text:
(a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), a person may perfect a security interest in a motor vehicle that is the subject of a first or subsequent sale only by recording the security interest on the title as provided by this chapter.

(b) A person may perfect a security interest in a motor vehicle held as inventory by a person in the business of selling motor vehicles only by complying with Chapter 9 (Applicability of Law to Commercial Transactions) , Business & Commerce Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.111 — Perfection of Security Interest

(a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), a person may perfect a security interest in a motor vehicle that is the subject of a first or subsequent sale only by recording the security interest on the title as provided by this chapter.

(b) A person may perfect a security interest in a motor vehicle held as inventory by a person in the business of selling motor vehicles only by complying with Chapter 9 (Applicability of Law to Commercial Transactions) , Business & Commerce Code.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 51, eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Except as provided by Subsection (b), a person may perfect a security interest in a motor vehicle that is the subject of a first or subsequent sale only by recording the security interest on the title as provided by this chapter.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A person may perfect a security interest in a motor vehicle held as inventory by a person in the business of selling motor vehicles only by complying with Chapter 9 (Applicability of Law to Commercial Transactions) , Business & Commerce Code.

history.raw: Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 51, eff. January 1, 2012.
